original_query: select sum(l_extendedprice) / 7.0 as avg_yearly from lineitem, part where p_partkey = l_partkey and p_brand = 'Brand#32' and p_container = 'MED PKG' and l_quantity < ( select 0.2 * avg(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = p_partkey );
rewritten_query:
with part_avg as (
    select l_partkey, avg(l_quantity) as avg_quantity
    from lineitem
    group by l_partkey
)
select sum(l_extendedprice) / 7.0 as avg_yearly
from lineitem
join part on lineitem.l_partkey = part.p_partkey
join part_avg on part_avg.l_partkey = part.p_partkey
where part.p_brand = 'Brand#32'
  and part.p_container = 'MED PKG'
  and lineitem.l_quantity < 0.2 * part_avg.avg_quantity;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Replaced correlated subquery with a CTE that precomputes average quantity per part
Used explicit JOIN syntax instead of implicit joins in the WHERE clause
Eliminated repeated scans of the lineitem table by computing averages once
